message:
Running command: # No VERILOG_FILES in step 36 env. Good.
# Check what the io.tcl read_pnr_libs reads in this context
# The io.tcl sets _PNR_LIBS from the Python wrapper - but here it's run standalone by LibreLane
# so LibreLane sets _PNR_LIBS in the environment before calling OpenROAD.

# Let's look at the step 36 _env.tcl for lib paths
grep "LIB\|EXTRA_LIB\|MACRO_LIB\|DEFAULT_CORNER" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/36-openroad-checkantennas-1/_env.tcl | grep "^set" | head -10
